name: the-art-of-gathering-how-we-meet-and-why-it-matters
description: Priya Parker's guide to creating meaningful gatherings — meetings, dinners, parties, weddings — with bold purpose, generous authority, deliberate design, and memorable closings.
useCase: Design gatherings that matter — with clear purpose, intentional hosting, well-chosen guests, and memorable structure.
knownRisks: Some recommendations (exclusion, controversy) may feel counterintuitive
Not a logistic manual — focuses on psychology and design
Requires courage to implement — being a chill host is easier
